stale_acknowledged.reason: Inter-file cluster spans 4 unrelated SUTs: audit_project pyramid-verdict integration, two PrivateImportsRule attribute-access scenarios (class method no-call, upper constant when enabled), a conftest cache re-parse R4 integration check, and a unit-level finding-count assertion for attribute detection. Different fixtures (tmp_path projects vs pkg_root vs mocker spy) and different rule APIs; no shared helper signature to fold across. ACK.
